understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked '+' on each level without dying, using at most 2 attempts per level and 50 turns per attempt, progressing through levels until the game is won.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose a horizontal move (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT) or CLICK (with a target [x,y]) or UNDO. After any horizontal move, gravity automatically carries the character in the current gravity direction until they land on a solid support tile (e.g., o/m/w), hit a hazard, or reach the '+' goal. CLICK interacts with clickable tiles (notably removing breakable 'x' blocks) to open/alter fall paths and does not count as a horizontal move. Landing on spike tiles ('u'/'v') immediately ends the run. UNDO reverts the previous action.
